recap:
- Databricks offers two methods to create a vector search index: SDK and UI.
- The SDK method utilizes the databricks-vectorsearch SDK for creating an index with managed embeddings.
- The UI method allows users to create an index with either managed or computed embeddings through the Databricks interface.
- When creating an index via SDK, managed embeddings are automatically computed and maintained by Databricks.
- Index refresh modes can be set to manual or sync based on update needs.
- A specific naming convention (catalog.schema.index_name) is used when defining the index name.
- For detailed instructions on creating an endpoint, refer to the Databricks endpoint documentation.
